summary: Iteration 134 - All 12 features tested successfully. Bitcoin icon runtime error fixed. Client data mismatch bug FIXED - each client now shows correct data (Chen=$5.20M, Mitchell=$1.45M, Wheeler=$2.85M). UnifiedInvestments has 8 tabs including Cash & TDs and Super & Pension. AdvisorCommandCenter has Dashboard and Decision Centre tabs. Route redirect /decision-center -> /advisor-command-center working. Client profile redesign verified with dark header, gold initials, info strip.

issues: Recharts console warnings about width/height -1 on initial render - cosmetic only, charts render correctly after layout settles
Modal appears on page load blocking interactions - user must dismiss it before interacting with page

context_for_next_testing_agent: All requested features working. Client360View correctly shows distinct data for each client via localStorage selected_client. UnifiedInvestments has 8 tabs. AdvisorCommandCenter has Dashboard/Decision Centre tabs. Route redirects work. Client profile has dark header (#0f1d35), gold initials, info strip with metrics bar.

bitcoin_icon_runtime_error_fix.details: Homepage loads without runtime errors. Bitcoin icon import working correctly.
